_comment: MOCKED external system. The directory CSV gives only name/phone/address; everything here is what we would ONLY learn by actually calling the supplier. Keyed by supplier name. `reached` models telephony reality (answer / voicemail / no_answer). The other fields are null until reached. `scenario` tags the failure mode this supplier exercises. Swap this for real call outcomes (or Cekura-simulated supplier personas) in production.

Lakeshore Medical Supply.note: Yes to all, can deliver in 3 days.

Windy City Home Medical.note: Yes, but next delivery window is a week out.

North Side Mobility.note: Rang out, no voicemail. Needs a callback.

Prairie DME Solutions.note: Not accepting new Medicare patients right now.

Great Lakes Mobility.note: Said yes on the call, then never sent confirmation. Classic stall.

Cicero Medical Supply.note: Yes, but does not accept assignment, so Eleanor would pay more.

Evanston Home Health.note: Yes to all, but it is a longer haul out to Evanston.
